title: Brook Steals the Road Poneglyph Copy
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Jinbe, Big Mom, Brook as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.text: A hectic night pre-cedes the wedding ceremony!

dialogue.text: Why's she sleeping with Brook in Her Arms?!

dialogue.text: And Brook's out cold too! I'm actually impressed he can sleep in that situation!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
